title: Duplicating an item with subitems
excerpt: I am Trying to duplicate an item and its subitems, but when I try to do this it only duplicates the item and not the sub items to. Is there a way I can do this?

posts.author: Lucymc (Lucy McGowan)
posts.cookedHtml: I am Trying to duplicate an item and its subitems, but when I try to do this it only duplicates the item and not the sub items to. Is there a way I can do this?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lucymc, thanks so much for posting!

You should be able to duplicate an item and its subitems. If it’s not working for you, can you write to support@monday.com, with a loom.com video or other screen recording showing what you are experiencing when you try to duplicate subitems? Then we can take a closer look
